nasb.text: I will cut off the chariot from Ephraim And the horse from Jerusalem; And the bow of war will be cut off. And He will speak peace to the nations; And His dominion will be from sea to sea, And from the River to the ends of the earth.

esv.text: I will cut off the chariot from Ephraim and the war horse from Jerusalem; and the battle bow shall be cut off, and he shall speak peace to the nations; his rule shall be from sea to sea, and from the River to the ends of the earth.

cnv.text: 我必從以法蓮除掉戰車， 從耶路撒冷除掉戰馬。 爭戰的弓必被除掉， 他要向列國宣講和平。 他的統治權必從這海延伸到那海， 從幼發拉底河直到地極。

ccb.text: 我必铲除以法莲的战车， 铲除耶路撒冷的战马， 战弓必被折断。 祂必向列国宣告和平， 祂必统治四海之疆， 从幼发拉底河直到地极。
